name: Spinach Pie (Fat Free) Well, Relatively Speaking, Fat Free!
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from spinach and wash it.
2. Cut onions and sauté in vegetable broth, wine, or water.
3. Wash and slice mushrooms and add to the onions. Cook until all liquid evaporates.
4. Remove onions and mushrooms from heat and put them in a large bowl.
5. Sauté spinach in vegetable broth, wine, or water, tossing frequently until all liquid evaporates.
6. Mix onions, mushrooms, and spinach together, making sure onions and mushrooms are evenly distributed throughout the spinach.
7. In a large bowl, beat egg whites lightly with a whisk.
8. Add grated cheese to the egg mixture and mix thoroughly.
9. Add the spinach mixture to the egg and cheese mixture and stir until well mixed.
CRUST:
- Phyllo dough
- PAM
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Spray a large, rectangular glass baking dish with PAM.
3. Quickly layer 7 to 10 sheets of phyllo on the bottom of the dish, spraying each layer lightly with PAM.
4. Spread half of the spinach filling on top.
5. Put another 7 to 10 sheets of phyllo, spraying lightly with PAM.
6. Spread the other half of the spinach filling.
7. Top with 10 to 15 sheets of phyllo, spraying each layer lightly with PAM.
8. Spray the top lightly with PAM.
9. Using a sharp knife, cut through the top layers of the phyllo dough in the desired pattern (e.g., large, small, rectangular, square, or diamond).
10. Bake at 375 to 400°F (190 to 200°C) for 35 minutes until golden brown.
